name: Nick Mullen
blurb: A nationally touring stand-up known for an ironic, internet-literate style, he opened for acts including Patrice ONeal, Jim Norton, and Hannibal Buress before headlining on his own.
bio: Nick Mullen is an American stand-up comedian and podcaster best known as the creator and co-host of the comedy podcast Cum Town (2016-2022) and its successor, The Adam Friedland Show. A nationally touring stand-up known for an ironic, internet-literate style, he opened for acts including Patrice ONeal, Jim Norton, and Hannibal Buress before headlining on his own. He released his first hour-long special, The Year of the Dragon, in 2023.

timeline.ev: Launches The Adam Friedland Show with Adam Friedland
Releases debut special The Year of the Dragon
